scripts.dev:web:build: node scripts/compose-run.js --env-file .env.docker --profile web exec web npm run build
scripts.dev:hybrid: npm run dev:docker:core && npm run dev:web:local
scripts.dev:docker:core: node scripts/compose-stop-service.js web && node scripts/ensure-env-docker.js && node scripts/compose-run.js --env-file .env.docker up -d --wait mysql api soketi
scripts.dev:docker:full: node scripts/ensure-env-docker.js && node scripts/compose-run.js --env-file .env.docker --profile web up -d --build --wait mysql api soketi web
scripts.dev:docker:infra: node scripts/ensure-env-docker.js && node scripts/compose-run.js --env-file .env.docker up -d --wait mysql soketi
scripts.dev:host: npm run dev:docker && npm run dev:app
scripts.dev:app: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:docker: node scripts/ensure-env-docker.js && node scripts/compose-run.js --env-file .env.docker --profile tools up -d --wait mysql phpmyadmin
scripts.dev:seed: node scripts/compose-run.js --env-file .env.docker --profile tools exec api php artisan db:seed --force
